originalTitle: The End of Oak Street | Official Trailer
content: Survive the Summer. The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings. Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker. Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.
chineseTitle: | 橡 | 树 | 街 | 的 | 尽 | 头 | | | | 官 | 方 | 预 | 告 | 片 |
chineseContent: 度过夏天。 《橡树街的尽头》仅在 8 月 14 日在影院和 IMAX 上上映。#EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX 在一场神秘的宇宙事件将橡树街从郊区撕裂并将他们的邻居转移到未知的地方后，普拉特一家很快发现，他们的生存取决于他们在现在无法辨认的环境中团结一致。 《橡树街的尽头》由安妮·海瑟薇和伊万·麦格雷戈主演，麦西·斯特拉和克里斯蒂安·康弗里也主演。该片由大卫·罗伯特·米切尔编剧并执导，J.J. 制作。艾布拉姆斯、汉娜·明格拉、乔恩·科恩、大卫·罗伯特·米切尔、马特·杰克逊和汤米·哈珀。执行制片人包括克里斯·本德、杰克·维纳、乔安妮·李和莉恩·斯通布莱克。米切尔的幕后团队包括摄影指导 Michael Gioulakis、制作设计师 Maya Shimoguchi、剪辑师 John Axelrad、作曲家 Michael Giacchino 和服装设计师 Erin Benach。华纳兄弟影业推出《坏机器人》制作、杰克逊影业制作、大卫·罗伯特·米切尔电影：橡树街的尽头。该影片将由华纳兄弟影业在全球范围内发行，仅于 2026 年 8 月 14 日在北美影院和 IMAX 上映，并于 2026 年 8 月 12 日开始在全球范围内发行。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
